scripts.lint:llm: pnpm exec eslint --config eslint.llm.config.mjs apps/app apps/storybook packages/ui
scripts.lint:llm:ci: pnpm exec eslint --config eslint.llm.config.mjs --max-warnings=0 apps/app apps/storybook packages/ui
scripts.python:lint:api: cd api && uv sync --extra lint --locked && uv run --project api ruff check . && uv run --project api ruff format --check .
scripts.python:lint:reporting: cd etl/phase2/reporting && uv sync --extra lint --locked && uv run --project etl/phase2/reporting ruff check . && uv run --project etl/phase2/reporting ruff format --check .
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @fodmap/content-config typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/types typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/reporting typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/storybook typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/app typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/marketing typecheck && pnpm --filter @fodmap/research typecheck
scripts.check:all: ./.github/scripts/quality-gate.sh && pnpm lint:ci && pnpm python:ci && pnpm openapi:check && pnpm tokens:check && pnpm tailwind:styles:check && pnpm ui:build && pnpm ui:styles:check && pnpm ui:typecheck && pnpm ui:test && pnpm --filter @fodmap/storybook typecheck && pnpm storybook:build && pnpm storybook:test && pnpm app:test && pnpm app:typecheck && pnpm app:build && pnpm marketing:typecheck && pnpm marketing:build && pnpm research:typecheck && pnpm research:build
